name: project-management-tools
description: Project management skills for turning messy inputs into aligned charters, plans, risks, status reports, change decisions, and retrospectives.

interface.shortDescription: Synthesize, plan, communicate, control, and learn from project work.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin with focused skills for project intake synthesis, charters, plans, risk registers, stakeholder communication, status reports, change request review, meeting action synthesis, and retrospectives.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose this project management request and recommend the right skill sequence.
Synthesize these project notes into risks, decisions, dependencies, and action items.
Create a project charter from this context.
Create a project plan with milestones, dependencies, risks, and communication cadence.
Create a status report for this project.
Review this change request and recommend a decision.
